assignment:
## Prompt
Write a 1,500-word essay connecting course themes to one real-world marine issue. You may focus on topics such as reef bleaching, fisheries management, deep-sea extraction, marine mammal protection, bycatch, sea turtle nesting habitat, or coastal restoration.
## Your Essay Should
- Define the issue clearly - Explain the relevant biology and ecology - Connect the issue to at least two course units - Discuss human impacts, tradeoffs, or policy considerations - Propose or evaluate a realistic response
## Structure Recommendation
1. Introduction and issue framing 2. Scientific background 3. Ecological and conservation analysis 4. Proposed response or evaluation of current efforts 5. Conclusion
## Evaluation Criteria
- Depth of understanding - Use of course concepts - Quality of analysis - Organization and clarity - Support with appropriate evidence or examples
